body:
Done. Here's the report.

## Files Changed

### 1. `src/app/api/live-video/route.ts` — NO CHANGES
Already at `v24.0` (line 18), even newer than requested `v23.0`. Graph API version is current. No action needed.

### 2. `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx` — 6 edits applied

| Fix | Lines (new) | Change |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| **Remove isMobile import** | line 3 (removed) | `isMobile` no longer used after dedup |
| **Add error state** | line 12 | `const [error, setError] = useState<string \| null>(null);` |
| **Remove mobile early return** | ~lines 17-19 (removed) | `if (isMobile) { return; }` deleted — fetch now runs on mobile too |
| **Clear error on retry** | line 19 | `setError(null);` added after `setIsLoading(true);` so stale errors clear on re-fetch |
| **Set error in catch** | line 52 | `setError("Unable to load live video. Try again later.");` added, keeps `console.error` |
| **Deduplicate JSX + add error render** | lines 68-105 | Removed `isMobile && isLive` early return ("Live Video only on Pc for now"), removed `!isMobile`/`isMobile` conditional duplication, single `{isLive && ...}` block for all devices. Added `{error && ...}` above it with brand orange `#FD7B2B` |

## Verification

- `npm run lint` → ✔ No ESLint warnings or errors
- `npx tsc --noEmit` → ✔ Clean (no output)

## Concerns

None. `v24.0` is active Graph API version. The `live_videos` endpoint path unchanged. Access token env vars untouched. Embed mechanism preserved.
